gaps_in.$help: Gap between windows in a layout

gaps_out.$help: Gap between windows and screen edges

no_focus_fallback.$help: Don't auto-focus when focused window closes

extend_border_grab_area.$help: Extended border grab area in pixels

hover_icon_on_border.$help: Show hover icon on window borders

modal_parent_blocking.$help: Block input to parent of modal windows

color_inactive.$help: Inactive window shadow color with alpha

around.$help: Dim amount around the active window

xray.$help: X-ray mode blur (only blurs behind foreground)

popups_ignorealpha.$help: Alpha threshold for popup blur ignore

input_methods_ignorealpha.$help: Alpha threshold for input method blur ignore

border_part_of_window.$help: Count border as part of the window

color_inactive.$help: Inactive window glow color with alpha

preserve_split.$help: Preserve split direction when moving windows

precise_mouse_move.$help: Precise mouse movement tracking for dwindle

default_split_ratio.$help: Default split ratio for new windows

use_active_for_splits.$help: Use active window for split calculations

special_scale_factor.$help: Scale factor for special workspace windows

new_status.$help: Master layout: new window placement status

new_on_active.$help: Master layout: where to place new windows ('master', 'slave', or 'false')

new_on_top.$help: Master layout: open new windows on top

drop_at_cursor.$help: Master layout: drop windows at cursor position

allow_small_split.$help: Master layout: allow small split sizes

always_keep_position.$help: Master layout: always keep master position

center_ignores_reserved.$help: Master layout: centering ignores reserved area

center_master_fallback.$help: Master layout: fallback when centering master

slave_count_for_center_master.$help: Master layout: slave count threshold for centering master

special_scale_factor.$help: Master layout: special workspace scale factor

follow_min_visible.$help: Minimum visible area to follow focus

fullscreen_on_one_column.$help: Fullscreen windows when only one column

single_window_aspect_ratio.$help: Preferred aspect ratio as 'w h' (0 0 = off)

single_window_aspect_ratio_tolerance.$help: Tolerance for single window aspect ratio

output.$help: Monitor name. Empty string = catch-all for unspecified outputs

disable_hyprland_logo.$help: Disable the Hyprland logo on empty workspaces

swallow_regex.$help: Regex for windows that swallow others

swallow_exception_regex.$help: Regex for windows that cannot be swallowed

exit_window_retains_fullscreen.$help: Exit fullscreen when closing a fullscreen window

size_limits_tiled.$help: Apply size limits to tiled windows

name_vk_after_proc.$help: Name virtual keyboards after their process

cm_sdr_eotf.$help: SDR EOTF curve for color management

direct_scanout.$help: Direct scanout for fullscreen windows (0=off, 1=on, 2=allow oversized)

expand_undersized_textures.$help: Expand undersized textures to fill the screen

icc_vcgt_enabled.$help: Enable ICC VCGT (Video Card Gamma Table)

keep_unmodified_copy.$help: Keep unmodified copy of buffers for screensharing

send_content_type.$help: Send content type to the display

use_nearest_neighbor.$help: Use nearest neighbor filtering for XWayland

special_fallthrough.$help: Allow input fallthrough to special workspaces

mouse_refocus.$help: Refocus window under cursor on mouse movement

float_switch_override_focus.$help: Override focus when switching to float

release_pressed_on_close.$help: Release pressed keys when virtual keyboard closes

workspace_swipe_min_speed_to_force.$help: Minimum swipe speed to force workspace change

workspace_swipe_direction_lock.$help: Lock workspace swipe to initial direction

move_snap_cursor.$help: Snap cursor to window on scroll focus change

command.$help: tctl subcommand (only used when action is 'tctl')

disable_while_typing.$help: Disable while typing for this device

scroll_factor.$help: Scroll speed factor for this device

repeat_rate.$help: Key repeat rate for this device

repeat_delay.$help: Key repeat delay for this device

focus_removed_window.$help: Focus the removed window from group

insert_after_current.$help: Insert new windows after current in group

merge_floated_into_tiled_on_groupbar.$help: Merge floated windows into tiled ones on group bar

merge_groups_on_drag.$help: Merge groups when dragging a group into another

font_weight_active.$help: Font weight for active group bar title

font_weight_inactive.$help: Font weight for inactive group bar title

gradient_round_only_edges.$help: Apply gradient rounding only to edges

keep_upper_gap.$help: Keep upper gap in group bar

middle_click_close.$help: Middle-click to close group bar windows

render_titles.$help: Render window titles in group bar

round_only_edges.$help: Round only the edges of the group bar

text_color_locked_active.$help: Active locked group bar text color (palette-mapped)

text_color_locked_inactive.$help: Inactive locked group bar text color (palette-mapped)

text_offset.$help: Text offset within the group bar

text_padding.$help: Text padding within the group bar

warp_on_toggle_special.$help: Warp cursor on special workspace toggle

warp_back_after_non_mouse_input.$help: Warp cursor back after non-mouse input

min_refresh_rate.$help: Minimum refresh rate for cursor updates

no_break_fs_vrr.$help: Don't break fullscreen VRR with cursor moves

use_cpu_buffer.$help: Use CPU buffer for cursor rendering

zoom_detached_camera.$help: Detach camera from cursor when zoomed

env.$help: Environment variables set before Hyprland starts

autostart.$help: Commands to run on Hyprland startup

leader.$help: Leader key chord for submap activation

suppress_maximize.$help: Suppress maximize requests from all applications

fullscreen_classes.$help: Window classes that should start fullscreen

no_anim_namespaces.$help: Layer surface namespaces to exclude from animations

animation_overrides.$help: Per-namespace animation overrides for layer surfaces

on_created_empty.$help: Command to run when workspace is created empty

bezier_curves.$help: Named bezier curves for animation easing

disable_keybind_grabbing.$help: Disable keybind grabbing by XWayland clients

hide_special_on_workspace_change.$help: Hide special workspace on workspace change

movefocus_cycles_fullscreen.$help: Move focus cycles through fullscreen windows

movefocus_cycles_groupfirst.$help: Move focus cycles through group first

pass_mouse_when_bound.$help: Pass mouse events when a mouse bind is active

window_direction_monitor_fallback.$help: Fallback to next monitor when no window in direction

workspace_center_on.$help: Monitor index to center new workspaces on (0 = no preference)
